sections.content: In today’s volatile, uncertain, complex and ambiguous(VUCA) world things are changing at faster pace where disruption is ‘new normal’. Organisation are advancing in highly dynamic & complex world where leaders and managers need to be agile and have the right leadership skills to cope with today’s VUCA business world. To lead in this VUCA world, leaders must accelerate & develop the cognitive readiness for sustainability and growth.

content: Understand VUCA world & its challenges in business
Skills & techniques for managing business in VUCA
Overcome volatility in business by having a long term vision and download it to the team
Explore various uncertainties for the business and make plan to address them
Understand levels of complexity in organisation & turn this to clarity for your people
Learn about ambiguity in business and have an agile corporate environment
